title: Kizaru Lands on Egghead
description: On pages 15–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Luffy, Kizaru, Nami as The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.
scene: The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Seems your friend left you out of the loop.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Looks like you waited for backup to grow a spine!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're all as good as dead... now that KZaru and I are working together!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You should know by now not to understand-- mate us!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was wondering where their ship got to when I didn't see it at the shore...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They sent an Admiral, Luffy! What should we do?!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ...than we were two years ago, KIZARU!!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Siege Begins through 21 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
